title: I built a tool to stop metadata loss: IPMD (Image Pixel Metadata)
content:
**The problem:** When you send photos through your device to another devices, the original metadata (date, time, etc..) is usually overwritten. [Read more.](https://github.com/777Tu/ipmd-core/blob/main/README.md)
[Repo on GitHub.](github.com/777Tu/ipmd-core)
